sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, MapPin, CheckCircle, Handshake, Plus, MessageCircle } from 'lucide-react'; const ConnectPage = ({ user }) => { const isFarmer = user.role === 'Farmer'; // Farmer State const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false); const [myListings] = useState([ { id: 1, crop: 'Tomato', qty: '500kg', price: '₹45/kg', date: '2023-11-20', status: 'Active' } ]); const [incomingRequests] = useState([ { id: 101, retailer: 'FreshMart Organics', offer: '₹42/kg', qty: '300kg', status: 'Pending' } ]); // Retailer State const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [filterCrop, setFilterCrop] = useState('All'); const [farmers] = useState([ { id: 201, name: 'John Doe', verified: true, crop: 'Tomato', qty: '500kg', price: '₹45/kg', location: 'Nashik, MH', distance: '15km', rating: 4.8 }, { id: 202, name: 'Jane Smith', verified: true, crop: 'Onion', qty: '2000kg', price: '₹22/kg', location: 'Pune, MH', distance: '8km', rating: 4.9 }, { id: 203, name: 'Bob Brown', verified: false, crop: 'Cabbage', qty: '800kg', price: '₹12/kg', location: 'Satara, MH', distance: '45km', rating: 4.2 } ]); const filteredFarmers = farmers.filter(f => { const matchesCrop = filterCrop === 'All' || f.crop === filterCrop; const matchesSearch = f.crop.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || f.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); return matchesCrop && matchesSearch; }); return (

Market Connect

{isFarmer ? 'Manage your crop listings and incoming business requests.' : 'Find verified farmers and negotiate deals directly.'}

{isFarmer && ( )}
{isFarmer ? ( // ================= FARMER VIEW =================
{showAddForm && (

Post New Crop

)}

Your Active Listings

{myListings.map(listing => (

{listing.crop}

{listing.status}
Qty: {listing.qty} Price: {listing.price} Est. Harvest: {listing.date}
))}

Incoming Offers

{incomingRequests.length === 0 ? (

No offers yet. Keep your prices competitive!

) : ( incomingRequests.map(req => (

{req.retailer}

{req.status}

Wants to buy {req.qty} of your Tomato crop for {req.offer}.

)) )}
) : ( // ================= RETAILER VIEW =================
setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} />

Farmers Near You

{filteredFarmers.map(f => (

{f.name} {f.verified && }

{f.location} ({f.distance})
★ {f.rating}
Crop: {f.crop}
Available: {f.qty}
Asking Price: {f.price}
))}
)}
); }; export default ConnectPage;
